← All NHC examples

NHC1 — single race, symmetric blend across 4 boats

Scoring system: NHC1    α (blend factor): 0.15 
Start 14:00:00 (= 50400 s). α = 0.15.
Four boats with starting TCFs 0.95, 1.00, 1.05, 1.10.

Boat   TCF    ET     CT       ratio    fair     adj       new
Alpha  0.950  3000   2850.00  1.4158   1.3450   +0.0593   1.0093
Beta   1.000  3600   3600.00  1.1208   1.1208   +0.0181   1.0181
Gamma  1.050  4200   4410.00  0.9150   0.9607   −0.0134   1.0366
Delta  1.100  4800   5280.00  0.7642   0.8406   −0.0389   1.0611

CT_avg = 4035.00, mean(TCF) = 1.025.
Fast boats (low CT) gain TCF; slow boats (high CT) lose TCF.

Race 1

Gun time: 14:00:00   α: 0.15   Finishers: 4   CTavg: 67m 15s   mean(TCF): 1.0250
RankNameSail # Finish timeETTCFappliedCT CTavg/CTfair TCFadjnew TCF Points
1 Alpha 1 14:50:00 50m 00s 0.9500 47m 30s 1.4158 1.3450 +0.0592 1.0092 1
2 Beta 2 15:00:00 60m 00s 1.0000 60m 00s 1.1208 1.1208 +0.0181 1.0181 2
3 Gamma 3 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0500 73m 30s 0.9150 0.9607 -0.0134 1.0366 3
4 Delta 4 15:20:00 80m 00s 1.1000 88m 00s 0.7642 0.8406 -0.0389 1.0611 4
